name: Lewers Lounge
tagline: The most elegant cocktail lounge in Waikiki — live jazz, classic cocktails, and old-school Halekulani glamour.
mustOrder: classic mai tai — Halekulani's refined version
dessert cocktails — the chocolate options are decadent
parking: Halekulani valet; street parking on Lewers St
talkStory: Named after painter Robert Lewers whose work hangs inside, this lounge has anchored the Halekulani since the hotel's 1984 rebuild. Nightly jazz performers include Grammy-nominated musicians who play here between mainland tours. The bartenders have collectively won more cocktail competitions than any other bar in Hawaii. At $25+ per drink it's not cheap, but old-guard Honolulu families have been celebrating anniversaries here for four decades.
